suite.name: v2/apply promo tncUrl is received when FF4J flag is enabled: theia.applyPromoSendResponseTncUrl

test.name: Validate cases for enabled and disabled flags

include.name: test tncUrl when FF4J applyPromoSendResponseTncUrl flag is enabled on mid
test tncUrl when FF4J applyPromoSendResponseTncUrl flag is disabled on mid
